features.name: chandle typedef with class constructor call in dead branch
features.description: Code should include a chandle type definition and a class constructor call with a function call argument inside a conditional branch that becomes dead after constant propagation

features.name: static singleton method returning chandle with dead branch usage
features.description: Code should include a static singleton pattern with a class method that returns a chandle type, used inside a dead code branch after constant propagation

features.name: bit type constant propagation causing dead branch
features.description: Code should include a 2-state bit variable initialized to 0 that causes constant propagation and makes a conditional branch dead code

features.name: virtual function returning chandle with null check
features.description: Code should include a virtual function that returns a chandle type and performs a null check on an object argument
